components.name: AccountTrigger
components.prompt: Create an Apex trigger on the Account object that prevents deletion of accounts with open opportunities.

components.name: AccountTrigger
AccountTriggerHandler
AccountTriggerHandlerTest

components.summary: This bundle includes an Apex Trigger, a handler class, and a comprehensive test class to ensure that Accounts with open Opportunities cannot be deleted. The logic is optimized for bulk processing and governor limit considerations.
governorLimitNotes: The handler processes all potential deletions in one pass to maximize governor limit efficiency.
The SOQL query is executed once, entirely outside of any for loop, to avoid consuming extra query limits.

components.name: AccountPreventDeleteTrigger
components.prompt: Create an Apex trigger on the Account object that prevents deletion of accounts with open opportunities.

components.name: AccountPreventDeleteTrigger
AccountPreventDeleteTriggerHandler
AccountPreventDeleteTriggerTest

components.summary: Corrected the Apex trigger handler to batch DML operations and prevent DML inside loops, ensuring compliance with Salesforce best practices. The Apex test class fully covers the trigger handler, including bulk, single, and negative tests.
governorLimitNotes: Bulkification in trigger handler to avoid processing single records at a time.
Efficient querying with deferred SOQL to eliminate SOQL inside loops.
